grouping_rule: Synonymous donor labels, spelling variants and donor subclasses were collapsed into donor branches; examples include D-ribose/ribose, maltose/maltose (Mal), galactose/galactose (Gal), galacto-oligosaccharide variants and dextran molecular-weight variants.
Numeric reaction times reported in hours were grouped into reaction windows to avoid treating nearby or paper-specific time settings as independent design axes.
Numeric temperatures were grouped into processing bands spanning low-temperature, moderate dry-glycation and high-severity regions.
Pretreatment labels were grouped by process family, with untreated/no-pretreatment records retained as a separate state and closely related labels merged.
Ratio strings reported in different units or notations were grouped into comparable ratio bands rather than counted as separate raw text labels.
pH, relative-humidity and water-activity entries were grouped as environment-control states while preserving whether the source described solution pH, RH or aw.
19 x 11 x 7 x 8 x 8 x 12 = 1,123,584; conceptual literature-derived upper bound, not a count of planned, feasible or executed experiments.
